hero.name: Thiago Pacheco
hero.bio: 21 years old, Software Engineering graduate from Universidad de Buenos Aires — one of only 3 people in history to graduate in record time (the last to achieve this was in 1938). Currently working as a Data Engineer at Lovelytics. Passionate about building innovative software solutions, from distributed systems to AI-powered tools.

items.shortDesc: Building data pipelines and engineering solutions at a US-based data analytics corporation.
items.fullDesc: Working as a Data Engineer at Lovelytics, a US-based data analytics corporation. Responsible for designing and implementing scalable data pipelines, optimizing data workflows, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver data-driven solutions for enterprise clients.

items.shortDesc: Won the annual engineering competition, presenting innovative solutions evaluated by industry leaders and public figures.
items.fullDesc: Competed and won FIUBAtón 2025, an annual engineering competition at the Faculty of Engineering (FIUBA). Teams tackle real-world problems and present their solutions to a jury composed of company executives, politicians, investors, and national authorities. The winning solution was selected by jury vote among all competing teams.

items.title: Melodía
items.shortDesc: A full-featured Spotify recreation with AI-powered capabilities.
items.fullDesc: A comprehensive music streaming platform recreating all of Spotify's core functionalities, plus two groundbreaking additional features: a Shazam-style search that identifies songs through humming or playing another song, and AI Cover — the standout feature — which lets users select any singer's voice and generate a cover of any song (imagine Michael Jackson singing a Queen track).

items.title: VibeTrip
items.shortDesc: A TripAdvisor recreation for discovering and reviewing travel destinations.
items.fullDesc: A complete recreation of TripAdvisor, featuring destination discovery, user reviews, trip planning tools, and an intuitive interface for exploring travel experiences worldwide.

items.title: Cassandra Engine
items.shortDesc: A Cassandra database engine built from scratch in Rust.
items.fullDesc: A complete implementation of a Cassandra database engine built from the ground up in Rust. Implements all of Cassandra's native protocols, including the CQL binary protocol, gossip protocol for node discovery, and distributed data management. Built for performance and correctness.

items.title: SpecForge
items.shortDesc: CLI platform for AI-powered Property-Based Testing of APIs. (Thesis)
items.fullDesc: My thesis project: a CLI platform specialized in Property-Based Testing (PBT) for APIs in any programming language. Leverages LLMs, a custom code parser and searcher, and a proprietary schema synthesis engine to automatically generate tests that find edge cases, security vulnerabilities, and volume limit scenarios for any API endpoint.

items.description: Third person in the entire history of the university to graduate in record time. The last person to achieve this feat did so in 1938.
Competed at the national level in Argentina's Informatics Olympiad and secured second place at just 16 years old.

items.institution: Escuela Superior de Comercio Carlos Pellegrini
items.description: Graduated from one of the most prestigious and nationally recognized secondary schools in Argentina.
